rule.name: js/samesite-none-cookie
rule.full_description: Sensitive cookies where the SameSite attribute is set to "None" can in some cases allow for Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) attacks.

message.text: Sensitive cookie with SameSite set to 'None'.

rule.name: js/log-injection
rule.full_description: Building log entries from user-controlled sources is vulnerable to insertion of forged log entries by a malicious user.

message.text: Log entry depends on a user-provided value.

rule.name: js/log-injection
rule.full_description: Building log entries from user-controlled sources is vulnerable to insertion of forged log entries by a malicious user.

message.text: Log entry depends on a user-provided value.
